acceptance_criteria_covered: AC1: usage by workflow type, Quick Consult volume, starts, completions, incomplete sessions, tenant/date filtering
AC2: Story 1.4 versioned event contract and malformed/unknown event gap handling
AC3: low-completion workflow detection and privacy-safe aggregate drilldown
AC4: delayed/unavailable telemetry freshness state instead of misleading zeros
AC1: operator endpoint supports tenant/date filters according to permissions
AC4: endpoint returns dashboard data envelope including freshness/unavailable state
AC1: GET /advisory/admin/operations/usage returns usage and completion metrics with tenant/date filters
AC2: instrumentation gaps are represented explicitly
AC3: response is aggregate-only and excludes raw private conversation content
AC4: freshness/unavailable status is part of the API contract
AC1: operator sees usage by workflow type, Quick Consult volume, structured workflow starts, completions, incomplete sessions, with tenant/date filtering according to permissions
AC2: dashboard surfaces unknown or malformed events as instrumentation gaps instead of valid zero counts
AC3: low-completion workflows can be drilled into through aggregate counts without raw private content
AC4: delayed or unavailable telemetry shows clear freshness/unavailable state and does not display misleading successful zero measurements
